title: codereview pass 1.3: Table and pseudocode consistency
description: P2 correctness: SNR table thresholds (-7.5 for SF7) do not align with pseudocode decision points (snr>12.0, <5.0, <8.0). Add explicit per-SF selection pseudocode with full decision tree. Table should include load_factor column. Update vectors to include EMA input. Only close project-LICHEN-8gac after 3 full passes with convergence on P3 or lower. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-8gac
